name_en: M30271 Monogram! (〽️Grade A Full Steel〽️) COIN Card Holder. This Coin card holder is crafted from Louis Vuitton's iconic black Taïga leather, featuring a sleek and sharp look, making it an ideal choice for safely storing coins and bills. It includes multiple credit card slots and bill compartments, plus a silver zip coin pocket. 8.0x14.5x1.0cm.
